title: Sushi Mod
body:
# SushiMod
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FeqoqEvs/images/a1abc08a2dca9b61da387c8f391daf8cf09bb121.png)
Explore a World of Culinary Delights with SushiMod!

SushiMod transforms your Minecraft experience by introducing a variety of delicious sushi, sashimi, and other food items. Immerse yourself in the art of sushi-making and enjoy the journey from farm to table in your Minecraft world.
Key Features:

🍚 Rice Crops

- Find and Grow: Rice seeds can be found in grass patches.
- Cook and Craft: Cook the rice to use it in various sushi recipes.

🥒 Cucumber Crops

- Locate Seeds: Cucumber seeds are found in tall grass.
- Harvest and Use: Cucumbers are essential for crafting tasty sushi rolls.

🦑 Calamari

- New Drops: Squid now drop raw calamari, which can be cooked or eaten raw.
- Versatile Ingredient: Use cooked or raw calamari in your sushi creations.
  
🍣 Wide Range of Sushi and Rolls

- Variety of Recipes: Craft a diverse menu of sushi, including Cucumber Rolls, Mushroom Rolls, Fish Rolls, and the extravagant Rainbow Roll.

📊 Food Nutrition and Saturation Values

- Rice, Cucumber, Nori: Nutrition 1, Saturation 0.1F
- Rice Ball: Nutrition 4, Saturation 0.4F
- Cucumber Roll: Nutrition 5, Saturation 0.5F
- Mushroom Roll: Nutrition 6, Saturation 0.6F
- Raw Calamari: Nutrition 2, Saturation 0.1F
- Cooked Calamari: Nutrition 4, Saturation 0.2F
- Sashimis: Nutrition 6, Saturation 0.6F
- Fish Rolls: Nutrition 8, Saturation 0.8F
- Pufferfish Roll: Nutrition 10, Saturation 1.0F
- Rainbow Roll: Nutrition 12, Saturation 1.2F
  
## Compatibility:

The Sushi mod is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21](https://modrinth.com/mod/sushimod/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21)
- [1.20 - 1.20.6](https://modrinth.com/mod/sushimod/versions?l=fabric&g=1.20.6&g=1.20.5&g=1.20.4&g=1.20.3&g=1.20.2&g=1.20.1&g=1.20)
- [1.16.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/sushimod/versions?l=fabric&g=1.16.4)

These versions for Forge:
- [1.18.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/sushimod/versions?l=forge)

## Get Started:

- Download and Install: Ensure you have the appropriate Minecraft version and follow our installation guide.
- Gather Ingredients: Start by finding rice and cucumber seeds, and hunt squid for calamari.
- Craft Delicious Sushi: Use the ingredients to create a variety of sushi and sashimi.
- Share Your Creations: Showcase your sushi dishes to friends and the community.

Elevate your Minecraft culinary experience with SushiMod. Download now and become a sushi chef in your Minecraft world!

Thank you for using our mods! For the best experience, visit our official website, [Exline Mods](https://exlinemods.com/).
Why Visit Our Website?

- Early Updates: Get the latest updates faster than other sites.
- Exclusive Tools: Download our mod setup program, also available on Nexus Mods.
- Crafting Recipes: Find detailed crafting recipes for our mods.
- Join the Community: Connect with fellow modders and get support via our Discord server.
- Direct Support and Feedback: Reach out directly for support and share feedback on Discord.

Get Started!
